paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 5.93, with a change of -5.12% compared to the prior close and -31.52% over the last 20 sessions. The price is as of July 16, 2026.

Recent news headlines include discussions of Fermi's stock valuation, governance questions, and the resignation of director Miles Everson due to disagreements over governance practices. There are also mentions of a convertible notes financing and the company's cofounder Toby Neugebauer commenting on market support.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K form disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of convertible senior notes and the resignation of director Miles Everson. Additionally, there was a filing related to the withdrawal of a solicitation to call a special meeting of shareholders. There has been one Form 4 filing and no Form 144 filings.
